stemHtml: As the pilot of G-ACME, you need to know your true bearing from the aerodrome at Karlsgrab. What message should you transmit to the aerodrome ATS unit?

options.a: Karlsgrab Homer, Golf Alfa Charlie Mike Echo request QDR.
options.b: Karlsgrab Approach, Golf Alfa Charlie Mike Echo request QGH.
options.c: Karlsgrab Homer, Golf Alfa Charlie Mike Echo request QTE.
options.d: Karlsgrab Approach, Golf Alfa Charlie Mike Echo request QDM.
